description: The International Criminal Court has issued warrants for the arrest of Putin and his accomplices in the kidnapping of Ukrainian children. This is a global matter, and there should be global consequences for it. Anyone who commits crimes against children must really feel that it is wrong. Today there are new sanctions against those who kidnap children and try to normalize it. And the pressure on Russia cannot be eased. Sanctions work. AND...
description_en: The International Criminal Court has issued warrants for the arrest of Putin and his accomplices in the kidnapping of Ukrainian children. This is a global matter, and there should be global consequences for it. Anyone who commits crimes against children must really feel that it is wrong. Today there are new sanctions against those who kidnap children and try to normalize it. And the pressure on Russia cannot be eased. Sanctions work. AND...
description_uk: Міжнародний кримінальний суд видав ордери на арешт Путіна та його спільників у викраденні українських дітей. Це глобальна справа, і за це мають бути глобальні наслідки. Кожен, хто скоює злочини проти дітей, має по-справжньому відчути, що це неправильно. Сьогодні є нові санкції проти тих, хто викрадає дітей і намагається це нормалізувати. title: Now our coalition for the return of Ukrainian children is truly...
title_en: Now our coalition for the return of Ukrainian children is truly...
title_uk: Тепер наша коаліція за повернення українських дітей справді...
description: Now our coalition for the return of Ukrainian children is truly global: from Canada and Latin America, from the United States and Argentina to Europe and Japan. And today Switzerland and Cyprus join our coalition. Now almost 50 countries are united in this coalition, and I am grateful for that. We see results almost every month. The children return home. But those who still need to be returned are many...
description_en: Now our coalition for the return of Ukrainian children is truly global: from Canada and Latin America, from the United States and Argentina to Europe and Japan. And today Switzerland and Cyprus join our coalition. Now almost 50 countries are united in this coalition, and I am grateful for that. We see results almost every month. The children return home. But those who still need to be returned are many...
description_uk: Зараз наша коаліція за повернення українських дітей справді глобальна: від Канади та Латинської Америки, від Сполучених Штатів та Аргентини до Європи та Японії. І сьогодні до нашої коаліції приєднуються Швейцарія та Кіпр. Зараз майже 50 країн об’єдналися в цій коаліції, і я вдячний за це. Практично щомісяця ми бачимо результати. Діти повертаються додому. Але тих, кого ще треба повернути, набагато...

title: Missile attack
description: Fedorov stated that Ukraine already has an analogue of the Taurus missile "If we are talking about the Taurus, then of course we now have missiles that operate at a similar and greater distance," the Minister of Defense noted at a briefing with his German colleague Boris Pistorius in Kyiv. Также он добавил, что Украина получает независимость в плане средств ударов по рашке: «Мы все видели удары по рф на 1500 км. И поэтому...

title: 🤝Ukraine and Germany are launching joint production of long-range...
title_en: 🤝Ukraine and Germany are launching joint production of long-range...
title_uk: 🤝Україна та Німеччина запускають спільне виробництво далекобійних...
description: 🤝Ukraine and Germany are launching joint production of long-range drones with a radius of up to 1,500 km. This was announced by Boris Pistorius during his visit to Kyiv. In addition, the countries signed a letter of intent to launch Brave Germany — a joint program to develop defense technologies and support innovative startups.
description_en: 🤝Ukraine and Germany are launching joint production of long-range drones with a radius of up to 1,500 km. This was announced by Boris Pistorius during his visit to Kyiv. In addition, the countries signed a letter of intent to launch Brave Germany — a joint program to develop defense technologies and support innovative startups.
description_uk: 🤝Украина и Германия запускают совместное производство дальнобойных дронов с радиусом до 1500 км Об этом сообщил Борис Писториус во время визита в Киев. Кроме того, страны подписали письмо о намерениях по запуску Brave Germany — совместной программы по развитию оборонных технологий и поддержке инновационных стартапов.

title: Energy infrastructure hit
